name: Narrow Valley Sportsplex
description: Narrow Valley Sportsplex is a place to play pickleball in Nesquehoning, PA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, youth programming, trainers or lessons, food, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Penn Forest Township Recreational Park
description: Come play pickleball at Penn Forest Township Recreational Park in Jim Thorpe, PA! There are 2 outdoor clay and asphalt courts. A tennis net is available, but you’ll need to create your own lines. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms.
